name: Amap (高德地图) MCP Server
what_it_does: Amap (高德地图/Gaode Maps) MCP server enabling AI agents to access China's leading maps and location service — geocoding addresses to coordinates, reverse geocoding, calculating routes and navigation, searching for nearby points of interest, and integrating Amap's comprehensive China location data into agent-driven location-aware workflows.
use_cases: Geocoding Chinese addresses to coordinates from location processing agents
Calculating driving/transit routes in China from navigation agents
Searching for nearby restaurants, hotels, or businesses from recommendation agents
Building location-aware services for China market from planning agents
Processing delivery addresses in China from logistics agents
Getting weather and traffic data for Chinese locations from monitoring agents
not_for: Non-China location data (use Google Maps or HERE for international maps)
Teams without Amap API key (requires Chinese phone number or business registration)
Privacy-sensitive location processing (Amap data goes to Alibaba/AutoNavi servers)
best_when: An agent needs maps and location services for China — geocoding, routing, or POI search within mainland China where Amap has superior coverage over Google Maps.
avoid_when: You're working outside China or need global map coverage — Google Maps, HERE, or Mapbox are better for international use.

auth.notes: Amap Web Service API key required. Register at lbs.amap.com. Requires Amap developer account (Chinese phone number or business verification often required). API key passed as parameter.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Amap free tier: 300,000 API calls/day for most services
pricing.paid_tiers: Commercial license required for business use; pricing varies by service
pricing.notes: Generous free tier for development. Commercial use requires Amap commercial license agreement. Registration requires Chinese identity verification or business license.

performance.rate_limits: 300,000 calls/day free for most APIs; QPS limits per API type

known_agent_gotchas: Amap developer account registration may require Chinese phone number or business verification
API documentation primarily in Chinese — barrier for non-Chinese-speaking teams
Data residency: all location data goes to Amap/Alibaba servers in China
Geographic coordinate system: Amap uses GCJ-02 (China standard), not WGS-84 — must convert
Community MCP from sugarforever — not official Amap MCP; may not expose all Amap APIs
Commercial use requires separate Amap business license agreement
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. API key authentication. Data sent to China-based servers. Community MCP. Store API key as environment variable. Location data privacy: all coordinates processed by Alibaba/AutoNavi.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. API key. Data in China. Community MCP. Review data residency requirements for your use case.
